normalized_requirements.raw_text: Justicebringer 2000 Specs Phase 2 Item Level 127 Binds when picked up Head Plate 1296 Armor +29 Stamina +13 Intellect Meta Socket Blue Socket Socket Bonus: +4 Spell Critical Strike Rating Durability 100 / 100 Requires Level 62 Requires Engineering (350) Equip: Improves spell critical strike rating by 39. Equip: Increases healing done by up to 101 and damage done by up to 34 for all magical spells and effects. Equip: Shows the location of all nearby gas clouds on the minimap. Equip: Slightly increases your stealth detection. Use: Allows you to look far into the distance. (3 Sec Cooldown) Sell Price: 6 69 71 This epic plate armor of item level 127 goes in the "Head" slot.
